Class Home

java.lang.Object
com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Home
public class Home extends Object
Represents a home in the Tibber API.

This class corresponds to the Home object in the Tibber GraphQL API. For more information, see: Tibber API Reference

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Home.Address
    Represents an address in the Tibber API.
    static class 
    Home.Features
    Represents features available for a home in the Tibber API.
    static class 
    Home.MeteringPointData
    Represents metering point data in the Tibber API.
    static class 
    Home.PriceInfo
    Represents price information in the Tibber API.
    static class 
    Home.Subscription
    Represents a subscription in the Tibber API.
